characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, light brown complexion. Dark hair tied back with loose strands framing her face. Expressive facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Dark grey or black long-sleeved button-up shirt with visible white stitching details.
characters.demeanor: Casual, slightly hesitant at first, then engaged and enthusiastic.

characters.appearance: 3D animated female character. Fair skin, bright red wavy hair, large expressive eyes.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: क्या आप English बोलते हो? [Do you speak English?]
Character A says: Uh, थोड़ा बहुत, टूटी-फूटी। [Uh, a little bit, broken.]
Character B says: कोई बात नहीं, अपना नाम बताइये? [No problem, tell me your name?]
Character A says: My name is Priya. [My name is Priya.]
Character B says: Nice. आप कहाँ से हो? [Nice. Where are you from?]
Character A says: I am Delhi. [I am Delhi.]
Character B says: आपने कहा "I am Delhi." Close! सही होगा: "I am from Delhi." [You said "I am Delhi." Close! The correct way is: "I am from Delhi."]
Character A says: Okay, I am from Delhi. I am Delhi... No... wait, I am from Delhi. [Okay, I am from Delhi. I am Delhi... No... wait, I am from Delhi.]
Character B says: Perfect! ऐसे ही। [Perfect! Just like that.]
Character A says: पर मैं अपनी English improve कैसे करूँगी? [But how will I improve my English?]
Character B says: Daily conversation practice से। [Through daily conversation practice.]
Character A says: पर इतनी ख़राब English में मैं किससे बात करूँगी? [But who will I speak to with such bad English?]
Character B says: मुझसे, of course! [With me, of course!]
Character A says: तुमसे? [With you?]
Character B says: हाँ! मैं Supernova की AI tutor हूँ। आप बिना झिझक के जितनी चाहें गलतियाँ कर सकते हैं। [Yes! I am Supernova's AI tutor. You can make as many mistakes as you want without hesitation.]
Character A says: Wait, ये तो सच में काम कर रहा है। तुमने मुझे दो सेकंड में सही कर दिया। [Wait, this is actually working. You corrected me in two seconds.]
Character B says: Supernova app download करो और रोज़ real-life situations practice करो। [Download the Supernova app and practice real-life situations daily.]
Character A says: Well, ये सही है। मैं अभी Supernova download कर रही हूँ! Let's go. [Well, this is good. I am downloading Supernova right now! Let's go.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable English mistake common among Indian learners.
- Introduces the AI tutor as a safe, non-judgmental practice partner.
- Demonstrates immediate value through a quick, encouraging correction.
- Ends with a clear call to action to download the app for real-life practice.

- Shows app store availability.
- Reinforces the final call to action visually.
